patterns.observation: 8 of 64 picks (12%) were voided due to players not in the lineup (Goldschmidt, Devers, Lindor, Acuna, Buxton, Yelich, McCutchen, and Buxton DNP). This inflated the pick volume without adding edge.
patterns.adjustment: Before logging hitter props, verify the player is in today's confirmed lineup via a lineup source. If unavailable, skip the prop.

patterns.observation: Royals ML (-130 to -145), F5 ML, and Over 9 all lost in a game where CWS won 6-2 and Bubic only struck out 4 (vs 6.5 K line). Three separate markets missed in the same game.
patterns.adjustment: CWS was a strong fade target at home. Do not commit multiple markets (ML + K + Total) in the same game unless the signal is exceptional across all three independently.

patterns.observation: Red Sox ML and F5 ML both lost (four picks across tiers). BOS starter Ranger Suarez struck out 8 but Phillies still won 3-1. Dominant K day without run support.
patterns.adjustment: Pitcher Ks and ML are partially decoupled. High K projection does not guarantee a win for the picking team. Reduce correlation assumption when building multi-market game plays.

patterns.observation: Astros ML and F5 ML both missed; Altuve went 0-for (two picks). Three market losses in one game.
patterns.adjustment: Altuve's hit prop at -180 to -195 was an aggressive line for a player in a poor stretch. Cross-reference recent performance before logging tight favorite props.

patterns.pattern: Strong ML and F5 accuracy on core picks
patterns.observation: CIN ML/F5_ML, NYM ML/F5_ML, MIL ML/F5_ML, MIN ML won cleanly. Four of seven confidence tier game picks (ML) correct.
patterns.adjustment: Continue confidence tier framework. The model identifies dominant team spots well but struggles with moderate favorites in competitive matchups.

patterns.pattern: McLean K miss despite quality start
patterns.observation: Nolan McLean struck out 7 against a 7.5 line, missing by half a K. One missed K in a strong outing.
patterns.adjustment: K lines set at 7.5+ carry meaningful miss risk even for quality starts. Weight confidence for K over 7.5 at B tier only if recent K rate strongly supports it.

adjustments: Require confirmed lineup check before logging hitter props
Limit to two markets per game for confidence tier plays
Reduce Altuve props when recent H/AB rate is below .200
